title: 'It's sad': The U.S.-UK 'special relationship' sours ahead of royal visit to Washington
summary_full: A year ago, it was all going so well for the U.S. and U.K.'s so-called "special relationship", but ties have soured.
summary_public: A year ago, it was all going so well for the U.S. and U.K.'s so-called "special relationship", but ties have soured.
